items.summary: Add a visible “Sign out” control on the /admin page that logs the current Internet Identity principal out by calling the existing Internet Identity context clear/logout function, returning the user to the admin sign-in screen.

When the user is authenticated via the credential-login mode on /admin, provide a “Sign out” control that clears only the credential-authenticated session state (username/password inputs, credential error/loading flags, and isCredentialAuthenticated) and returns the user to the admin sign-in options screen.
